description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The exterior walls are clad in brick, and the property is enclosed by a white picket fence. The front yard features a paved driveway and several mature trees providing shade. The backyard includes a swing set, patio furniture, a hot tub, and additional landscaping with small coniferous shrubs. Large windows and a glass-paneled door offer ample natural light and a welcoming entryway.
description: A single-story brick house with a gable roof, white picket fence, mature trees, and a landscaped yard featuring a swing set and hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and two large trees partially obscuring the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick wall, backyard swing set, patio furniture, and white fence with two small coniferous shrubs outside.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the hot tub, patio furniture, large windows, and a paved area within the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Side view with the glass-paneled door, driveway, and a clear view of the swing set and patio area inside the fenced yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Central glass-paneled door with a paved approach, no porch or overhang, flanked by large windows.
